chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-3223 of 2015 ______________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge Present Mr. Justice Muhammad Ali Mazhar Mr. Justice Arshad Hussain Khan Wali Muhammad.............. Petitioner V E R S U S Province of Sindh & another.............. Respondents Date of hearing 29.09.2016 Mr. Ali Ahmed Ghumro advocate for the petitioner Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi A.A.G Wali Mohammad Baloch, Director, Agriculture Research Sindh, Tandojam. ------------------------- Muhammad Ali Mazhar, J: The claim of the petitioner is that on 07.04.2009 on the recommendation of Departmental Selection Committee, the petitioner was offered post of Field Beldar in B.P.S-2 on temporary basis for a period of two years. Since he has not been allowed joining, therefore, he has filed this petition on 30.5.2015 for directions against the Respondents. 2. The parawise comments were filed by the Respondent No.2 in which specific plea has been taken that the petitioner was required to report within 15 days but he failed to report, consequently, his appointment order was cancelled. Learned A.A.G submits that at present there is a ban imposed by provincial government against all appointments, however, petitioner may apply afresh to the competent authority and his application will be considered immediately after lifting of ban. While learned counsel for the petitioner submits that still Respondents are continuously appointing persons on the same post but the petitioner is being discriminated. 2 - 2 - 3. At the very outset, we are of the firm view that the appointment order was issued in the year 2009 but the petitioner has approached this court in the year 2015 with the grievance that he was not allowed joining. 4.

While learned counsel for the petitioner submits that still Respondents are continuously appointing persons on the same post but the petitioner is being discriminated. 2 - 2 - 3. At the very outset, we are of the firm view that the appointment order was issued in the year 2009 but the petitioner has approached this court in the year 2015 with the grievance that he was not allowed joining. 4. As a result of above discussion, this petition is disposed of with the directions to the Respondent No.2 that if petitioner applies for the same job afresh his application shall be considered and if he is found eligible for the appointment as Field Beldar, he will be accommodated according to law. JUDGE JUDGE Aadil Arab
